title: Kenyan-Style Fried Fish
description: A flavorful and spicy fried fish dish inspired by Kenyan cuisine. Serve with a side of crunchy slaw made with crunchy slaw mix, lime juice, and a dash of hot sauce.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, anchovy paste, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
2. Dredge the fish pieces in the seasoned flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Heat the lard or oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F.
4. Fry the fish pieces in batches until golden brown and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Remove the fish from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the crunchy slaw mix, lime juice, and a dash of hot sauce.
7. Serve the fried fish with the slaw on the side.
